Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to produce a Python dictionary representing the temporal profile for some global supply chain process The process includes activities Supplier Selection SS Order Placement OP Receive Components RC Quality Inspection QI Component Assembly CA Product Testing PT Packaging PK Warehouse Storage WS Distribution DT After Sales Support AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The task says we need produce a Python dictionary representing the temporal profile It is given that each pair of activities eventually following each other in process execution not only directly connected but eventually following each other

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For a given trace like A B C D the pairs A B A C A D B C B D and C D must be considered So it means that for each process execution we consider every pair of activities in chronological order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The instructions say for each pair that appear in the global supply chain process not only directly connected but eventually following each other assign an estimated average time and standard deviation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The list of activities can be thought as chronological ordering SS to OP to RC to QI to CA to PT to PK to WS to DT to AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I can produce a dictionary with these keys direct pairs SS OP OP RC RC QI QI CA CA PT PT PK PK WS WS DT DT AS Then some additional pairs that are not consecutive SS QI OP PT RC WS CA PK QI WS OP AS SS AS

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says representative subset so maybe choose about 10 to 15 pairs that capture both immediate and non immediate relationships

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We need to assign plausible durations in seconds as sample does I can create estimates based on typical durations for decision making logistics inspection assembly testing packaging storage distribution and support

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For immediate pairs I will assign estimated values such as SS OP 3600 1800 OP RC 86400 3600 RC QI 7200 3600 QI CA 14400 7200 CA PT 28800 14400 PT PK 3600 1800 PK WS 7200 3600 WS DT 86400 3600 DT AS 3600 1800

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For pairs that are further apart the average is cumulative because the further apart the activities the longer the time difference

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For SS QI mean equals 3600 plus 86400 plus 7200 giving 97200 and the standard deviation is computed from the component deviations giving 5400

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For OP PT mean equals 86400 plus 7200 plus 14400 plus 28800 giving 136800 and the standard deviation is about 16900

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For RC WS mean equals 7200 plus 14400 plus 28800 plus 3600 plus 7200 giving 61200 and the standard deviation is about 17000

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For QI WS mean equals 14400 plus 28800 plus 3600 plus 7200 giving 54000 and the standard deviation is about 16600

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For OP AS the mean is 237600 and the standard deviation is about 17800

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For SS AS the mean is 241200 and the standard deviation is about 17900

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will include immediate ones and a selected set of non immediate ones to keep the dictionary representative and not too huge
